name: failure-prediction
paperTitle: Accurate Failure Prediction in Agents Does Not Imply Improved Safety
content:
## Introduction

High accuracy on failure prediction doesn't guarantee safety improvements; requires careful integration with safety mechanisms. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

High accuracy on failure prediction doesn't guarantee safety improvements; requires careful integration with safety mechanisms.
